---
title: "庄子 / Zhuangzi"
subtitle: "12 篇类别长文"
listing:
  - id: zhuangzi-categories
    contents: "category-*.qmd"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, description]
---

## Complete Track

The Zhuangzi cultural track covers all 33 chapters (7 Inner / 15 Outer / 11 Miscellaneous) across 12 Omega thematic categories. Each essay maps a cluster of chapters to specific Lean 4 theorem anchors.

Unlike the I Ching (which IS a binary system) or the Tao Te Ching (which describes the generative ground), the Zhuangzi's unique contribution is its relentless destabilization of fixed viewpoints. Its strongest formal correspondences are with **inverse limits** (freedom as trans-scalar coherence), **fold/quotient** (equalizing distinctions), and **rate-distortion** (finite agents navigating unbounded structure).

## Strongest Structural Correspondences



## Category Map

| # | Category | Chapters | Omega Directions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [逍遥与尺度超越](category-01-free-wandering-scale-transcendence.qmd) | 1, 17, 21, 32 | modular-tower-inverse-limit, dynamical-systems, spectral-theory |
| 2 | [齐物与差异折平](category-02-equalizing-things-folding-distinctions.qmd) | 2, 17, 26, 27 | fold-operator, spectral-theory, modular-tower-inverse-limit |
| 3 | [养生保真与技艺阈值](category-03-nourishing-life-skillful-fidelity.qmd) | 3, 19, 20 | rate-distortion-information-theory, fold-operator, zeckendorf-representation |
| 4 | [人间处世与最小干预](category-04-human-affairs-minimal-intervention.qmd) | 4, 11, 24 | fold-operator, rate-distortion-information-theory, fiber-structure |
| 5 | [德充、形残与容纳能力](category-05-embodied-virtue-receptive-capacity.qmd) | 5, 20, 23, 31 | fiber-structure, fold-operator, zeckendorf-representation |
| 6 | [宗师、死生与化生一体](category-06-death-life-transformation-unified-process.qmd) | 6, 18, 22 | modular-tower-inverse-limit, dynamical-systems, spectral-theory |
| 7 | [应帝王、天地与天道治理](category-07-responsive-rule-cosmic-governance.qmd) | 7, 12, 13, 14 | dynamical-systems, spectral-theory, fold-operator |
| 8 | [反技艺、反雕刻与制度过塑](category-08-anti-artifice-critique-of-overstructuring.qmd) | 8, 9, 10 | golden-mean-shift, fold-operator, rate-distortion-information-theory |
| 9 | [刻意、缮性与稀疏规范](category-09-self-cultivation-sparse-norms.qmd) | 15, 16, 23 | zeckendorf-representation, fold-operator, golden-mean-shift |
| 10 | [认识分辨率与视角转换](category-10-epistemic-resolution-perspective-scaling.qmd) | 17, 22, 25, 32 | modular-tower-inverse-limit, rate-distortion-information-theory, spectral-theory |
| 11 | [让王、盗跖与权力反讽](category-11-power-refusal-and-inversion.qmd) | 28, 29, 30 | fold-operator, rate-distortion-information-theory, spectral-theory |
| 12 | [寓言、外物与言意边界](category-12-parable-external-things-discursive-limits.qmd) | 26, 27, 33 | modular-tower-inverse-limit, rate-distortion-information-theory, spectral-theory |

## Category Essays

:::{#zhuangzi-categories}
:::

---

[Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
